subcodes.first_line: O assemblage of light! Mr. and Mrs. Bosch came to the Holy Land and praised the friends of Heilbronn. They said these enlightened souls are filled with heavenly sentiments
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جمع نورانی مستر و مسیس باشی حاضر ارض مقدس شدند و در ستایش احبای هیلبرون
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @growth of the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
